title: SKILL.md frontmatter version drift
issue: version field is 1.2.2.0 but latest changelog is v1.6.0.0
impact: Version contract broken between SKILL.md and changelog; operators misled about current version
evidence: changelog/ directory contains v1.6.0.0.md as latest entry
Precedent: deep-research had similar drift (v1.6.2.0 vs v1.11.0.0)

title: v1.4.0.0 changelog is placeholder with no-op content
issue: Changelog claims 'deep-agent-improvement → deep-agent-improvement' rename (no-op, same name to same name)
impact: Changelog integrity compromised; historical record corrupted; misleading version history
fix: Either delete v1.4.0.0.md (if no actual release occurred) or fill in actual v1.4.0.0 content (likely skill folder rename from sk-improve-agent to deep-agent-improvement)

title: v1.4.0.0 changelog origin unclear
issue: No clear git commit created v1.4.0.0.md; appears only in refactor commits (40dcf80052, 6647661f32)
impact: Provenance unclear; may be artifact of directory restructure rather than actual release
fix: Determine if v1.4.0.0 was a real release or placeholder; act accordingly
evidence: git log --follow shows v1.4.0.0.md only in plural refactor commits
No dedicated changelog authoring commit like 81894a5b27 for v1.6.0.0

title: Changelog directory path changed in refactor
issue: Changelog files moved from .opencode/skill/deep-agent-improvement/changelog/ to .opencode/skills/deep-agent-improvement/changelog/ in commit 40dcf80052 (plural rename)
impact: Historical path references in older changelogs may be stale; cross-skill references may break
fix: Verify all path references in changelogs point to current locations after plural refactor
evidence: git log --follow shows path change in commit 40dcf80052
